productDisplayName: Forever New Women's Cream Floral Print Top
description: CompositionCream flared sleeveless top made of 100% viscose, with purple floral print, waterfall ruffles and lace made of 100% nylon around the armholes and with tie-up strings from the armholes tying at the backFittingRegularWash careCold hand wash separatelyWash garment inside outDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDrip dry in shadeCool iron on reverse sideDo not iron lace trim/embellishmentsDo not dry cleanTake feminine dressing to the next level in this cream floral printed flared sleeveless top from forever new. The violet rose prints, waterfall ruffles and lace trims give this top a dreamy feel. The tie ups at the back keeps the tops snugly in place. Team this with light blue skinny jeans, pearls and silvery heels for a really fresh look. Model statisticsThe model wears size MHeight-5.8", Chest-33"
